0.text: Bronchial wall thickening centrally in both lungs

1.text: Bronchiectasis in the left lingula and lower lobe

2.text: Bronchial wall thickening in the left lingula and lower lobe

3.text: Peribronchial reticulonodular infiltrates in the left lingula and lower lobe

4.text: Nonspecific nodules in both lungs, largest 5 mm in diameter
